data.title: White House Considering New CFTC Head Picks As Brian Quintenz Delays Continue
data.description:

White House Considering New CFTC Chair PicksAccording to a September 24 report from Semafor, the White House is looking at former CFTC official Josh Sterling as the agency’s potential chair […]
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/white-house-weighs-new-cftc-picks-brian-quintenz-delays/

data.title: Intel up 36% in September, as Oracle, Tesla, and Strategy tumble
data.description:
Intel has jumped 36% this month, making it one of the biggest risers on Wall Street in September and putting it on track for its largest monthly gain since 1987, according to data from CNBC. The rally comes as the company reportedly tries to pull Apple into its comeback effort with a new investment deal. […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/intel-up-36-tsls-mstr-orcl-down/

data.title: Hyperliquid responds to the challenge, prepares for builder-deployed markets
data.description:
Hyperliquid presented its HIP-3 infrastructure, offering builder-generated perpetuals markets. The feature is available on testnet, and will launch on mainnet soon. HIP-3 markets will be more diverse and will carry higher fees, with 50% going to Hyperliquid.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/hyperliquid-responds-to-the-challenge-prepares-for-builder-deployed-markets/

data.title: Bitcoin ETFs Surge Back With Record $241M Inflows — ETH ETFs Still Bleeds
data.description:
Bitcoin exchange-traded funds (ETFs) bounced back sharply on September 24, recording $241 million in net inflows after two straight days of investor withdrawals, according to data from SoSoValue. The turnaround comes after a combined $244 million in outflows on September 23 and a larger $439 million exit the day before, as markets adjusted to the […]
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/bitcoin-etfs-surge-back-with-record-241m-inflows-eth-etfs-still-bleeds/

data.title: Crypto Liquidations Top $1B as Bitcoin, Ether, Solana Selloffs Worsen
data.description:
Liquidations in the cryptocurrency market have surged to over $1 billion as significant sell-offs of major digital currencies, including Bitcoin, Ether, and Solana, continue to escalate, reflecting increasing market volatility and investor anxiety.
source: https://www.coindesk.com/markets/2025/09/25/crypto-liquidations-top-usd1b-as-bitcoin-ether-solana-selloffs-worsen

data.title: What is Dogecoin: The People’s Coin That Won’t Quit
data.description:
Dogecoin, often referred to as "The People's Coin," is a unique cryptocurrency that has captured the imagination of millions around the globe, characterized by its dog-themed branding and active community. Despite its humble beginnings as a lighthearted parody of the more traditional cryptocurrencies, Dogecoin has proven to be remarkably resilient and adaptable, continuously gaining traction and support in the ever-evolving digital currency landscape. Its decentralized nature and emphasis on community engagement have helped it maintain a steadfast presence, making it a lasting contender in the world of cryptocurrency. Whether it's through philanthropic efforts, tipping content creators online, or being embraced by celebrities, Dogecoin has solidified its position as a symbol of grassroots enthusiasm and unwavering commitment in the face of challenges.
source: https://blocknews.com/what-is-dogecoin-the-peoples-coin-that-wont-quit/

data.description:

Ukraine branded ‘heavy crypto user’ Cryptocurrency has gained popularity in Ukraine since Russia […]

data.title: Strong Jobs Report Sends Dollar Flying As Bitcoin Falls Below $111K – End of BTC Bull Market?
data.description:
A surprisingly strong U. S. jobs report thrust financial markets this week, sending the dollar flying to a three-week high while Bitcoin tumbled below $111,000 as initial jobless claims dropped by 14,000 to 218,000 marking a two-month low and Q2 GDP growth was revised upward to 3. 8% from 3. 3%, weakening the case for rapid Fed cuts with October rate cut odds dropping to 85. 5% from 92%.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/strong-jobs-report-sends-dollar-flying-as-bitcoin-falls-below-111k-end-of-btc-bull-market/
